description_long: This bungalow features a modern, geometric facade with angled wooden paneling and large glass windows flanking a central double glass door. The front elevation is visually striking, with diagonal wooden slats creating a dynamic pattern and providing partial privacy to the interior. The roof is a single-sloped shed style, finished in a dark, matte material that contrasts with the lighter wood tones below. The side and rear elevations are more minimal, with the rear wall featuring a set of horizontal windows and the sides being mostly solid and dark. The interior appears to have an open-plan layout with visible stairs or shelving through the front glass. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, natural materials, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern bungalow with a slanted dark roof, angled wooden paneling, and large glass windows and doors on the front facade. The design is geometric and contemporary, with a striking mix of wood and glass.
description_view_0: Front view showing double glass doors, large windows, and distinctive diagonal wooden paneling.
description_view_1: Side view with a solid dark wall and a small set of horizontal windows near the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full extent of the angled wooden paneling and no visible doors or large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid dark wall and the edge of the open glass door visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical front-facing windows with grouped horizontal rear windows
